features.evidence: Holds charge well, and runs smoothly too. Battery health is at 100% and super easy to set up and transfer from my iPhone 12.

This is such an upgrade in camera, look and even size of the screen and for under $400, this was a great deal! So far I give it a 5 stars the battery was at 100% no visible scratches on the screen camera seems perfect everything is as if it’s brand new !
value: display pixel density: 460 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)

value: rear facing camera photo sensor resolution: 48 MP
